Settlement chamber · Ethereum Mainnet identity

Proof-settled
machine work
under human authority.

A public evidence institution for AGIJobManager: contract identity, proof lifecycle, readable architecture, Evidence Docket, and a default read-only chamber plus a separated Expert Mainnet Console for human-signed wallet operations.

Open the settlement chamber →Inspect the Evidence Docket
DEFAULT DENY. Public website only. Default deny on public pages. Expert operations require manual wallet connection, exact approvals, typed confirmation, preflight, gas estimate, and human wallet signature.

From raw contract to public proof institution

The contract settles.
The institution proves.

AGIJobManager remains the on-chain settlement rail. This repository is the public-facing architecture that makes the rail legible: identities, boundaries, manifests, evidence, operator posture, and review path.

Request
Escrow
Execute
Prove
Validate
Settle
Chronicle
Identity

Canonical addresses

AGIJobManager: 0xB3AA...81d1
AGIALPHA: 0xA61a...a1fA
Official token address: 0xA61a3B3a130a9c20768EEBF97E21515A6046a1fA
Token availability: third-party markets only; not available from MontrealAI or this site.
Chain: Ethereum Mainnet.

Evidence

Public proof room

Claims, non-claims, lifecycle packets, risk ledger, rollback boundary, and machine-readable manifests are surfaced for review without exposing private intelligence.

Operator posture

Read-only first

The public chamber exports unsigned GoalOS intent JSON. Expert Mainnet operations are intentionally separated behind a dedicated console that mirrors the legacy operating posture and requires explicit human wallet confirmation.

The public surface

Four rooms.
One proof path.

01

Settlement chamber

Compose a mission, run the local proof cycle, inspect gates, and export a public-safe docket.

02

Evidence Docket 6.1

A claim-bound audit room for public proof and private boundary discipline.

03

Architecture

Separation of contract, website, evidence, expert console, and governance.

04

Verification

Production URL, QA results, canonical identities, and publish boundary.

05

Final Assurance

Capability contract, public/expert separation, live identity checks, file hashes, and review-ready docket.

User additions

Run it locally.
Understand it instantly.

New browser-local demos let users run proof cycles, compose mission packages, and export public-safe dockets with no account, no analytics, no cookies, no storage, no wallet, and no external action.

Start the guided path →Open Demo LabOpen Mission Studio
06

Start

A friendly guided route for first-time visitors.

07

Demo Lab

Autonomous local proof-flight demos with downloadable dockets.

08

Proof-to-Action Theatre

Run the shortest public demonstration of GoalOS: objective, proof gates, governed decision state, action graph, Chronicle, and reusable capability.

09

Mission Studio

Plain-language objective to local proof-pack generator.

10

Proof Cards

Copyable public-safe explanations for stakeholders.

Proof-governed multi-agent institution

Large systems coordinate when proof decides what survives.

Run a browser-local coordination lab that compares swarm activity, fixed crews, and proof-governed institutions. Watch gates advance, inspect the Chronicle, and export a public-safe Evidence Docket.

Open Coordination Lab →Copy proof cards
Coordination law

Not more agents. Better proof loops.

AI Work = Output × Proof × Validation × Settlement × Reuse.

Maximum coordination is verified useful work per unit of risk, cost, latency, and proof debt.

Proof-to-Action Theatre

Set the objective.
Run until proof is done.

A new browser-local demonstration of the core GoalOS idea: output becomes useful only when it becomes a governed decision state with claims, evidence, verification, risk, action graph, Chronicle memory, and reusable capability.

Open Proof-to-Action Theatre →Open Demo Lab
Objective → Proof → Decision State

AI creates output. GoalOS creates proof.

The theatre compares report-only output with a GoalOS proof loop and emits a public-safe Evidence Docket. No account, no tracking, no storage, no wallet, no network request, no external action.

Proof Gradient Arena

Score is advisory.
Gates are mandatory.

The newest browser-local demonstration shows why GoalOS does not let persuasive output propagate by score alone. Choose candidates, adjust evidence, run the Selection Gate, and export a SelectionCertificate plus public-safe docket.

Open Proof Gradient Arena →Open Proof Theatre
Selection Law

No proof, no evolution.

High value cannot bypass proof validity, evaluator pass, risk threshold, rollback readiness, canary readiness, scope authorization, or challenge clearance.

SOVEREIGN MACHINE ECONOMY

Meta-Agentic cognition, Alpha Node runtime, AGI Jobs work OS, and AGIJobManager settlement now share one implementation contract.

This repository enhances the Ascension chamber with a local Sovereign Machine Economy route, deterministic proof-flight model, data contract, schema, tests, and Expert Console handoff. The public route remains default-deny; live Mainnet authority is separated.

Enter Sovereign Machine EconomyExpert Mainnet Console
Token boundary

AGIALPHA is not available from this site.

Official Ethereum Mainnet address: 0xA61a3B3a130a9c20768EEBF97E21515A6046a1fA. AGIALPHA is treated as a pre-existing public-market token. This website does not sell, offer, distribute, custody, broker, exchange, route, redeem, market-make, price-support, liquidity-support, recommend, or make it available. Users/operators are solely responsible for any third-party market, wallet, RPC, tax, sanctions, securities, privacy, or jurisdictional decision.
